composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION. Signal matrix shows BEAR phase without crisis-level drawdown. BTC z-score sits at +1.53, well above the -3.0 threshold required for crisis entry. While we remain in confirmed bear conditions (15.4% below 200d MA), the backtest for undiluted BEAR phase without structural breaks shows -6.2% median at 120 days - insufficient edge to justify entry. No tactical dip to exploit here.

Structural risk is actively blocking positions. BTC sits 47.3% below its 1yr high, exceeding the -35% filter threshold that signals regime breakdown. Realized volatility at 35% also falls short of the 40% minimum, indicating insufficient stress to generate mean reversion. Hold cash until either a genuine crisis z-score emerges (< -3.0) or price recovers above 200d MA to flip the regime.
